name: Geometron
description: Lua scripting engine for Geometry Dash

lua-max-execution-time.name: Lua: Max Execution Time
lua-max-execution-time.description: Controls the maximum amount of time Lua scripts can execute for in one frame before they are paused (so the game can render), specified in milliseconds

lua-interrupt-resolution.name: Lua: Interrupt Resolution
lua-interrupt-resolution.description: Sets the intervals of Lua VM instructions after which the max execution time will be checked

lua-uninterruptible-grace-time.name: Lua: Uninterruptible Grace Time
lua-uninterruptible-grace-time.description: Controls the amount of time the Lua script is allowed to be in a non-yieldable context (e.g. a metamethod) before it is forcibly terminated

lua-allow-debug-library.name: Lua: Allow Debug Library
lua-allow-debug-library.description: Controls or not to allow access to the debug.* library for Lua scripts, mostly useful for developing Geometron itself; do not enable unless you completely trust the scripts you are running, as this makes it incredibly easy to escape the sandbox!

console-font-size.name: Console: Font Size
console-font-size.description: Controls the size of the font for the script console window, as a multiplier of the default size

console-line-height-multiplier.name: Console: Line Height Multiplier
console-line-height-multiplier.description: Controls the amount of separation between lines in the script console window, as a multiplier of the default size; values less than 1 may cause text to overlap

console-auto-focus-input.name: Console: Auto-Focus Input
console-auto-focus-input.description: If enabled, whenever the script window is opened while the console tab is selected, the console input text box will automatically be focused.
